description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a global before_script that updates apt and installs python-pip. Define stages lint and test. Add a lint_job in the lint stage that runs pip install pylint then pylint and is allowed to fail. Add a pages job (using python:3.5) in the test stage that installs make, installs tox, runs tox, moves docs/build/html to public, and publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, with the TOXENV variable set to docs and runs on docker tags. Add multiple test jobs for each Python version and pypy: test:2.7, test:3.3, test:3.4, test:3.5, test:pep8, test:pep8py35, test:py35failskip, test:py35limit, test:py35prefix, test:pypy, test:pypy3, test:pytest27, test:pytest35, each in the test stage, using the specified Docker image, running pip install tox then make test, and setting the appropriate TOXENV variable. Finally add a test_cov job using ubuntu:14.04 that installs software-properties-common, adds the deadsnakes PPA, installs python3.5, python2.7 and python-pip, installs tox, and sets TOXENV to py2-cover,py3-cover,coverage.
